description:
For tasks of type=epic, compute completion ratio from closed_children (archived) + live children with parent pointing at the epic. Render a small bar inline.

Example in bl list / bl show:
  ● ○ open          bl-a3f8   Migrate auth layer  [epic]  ██████░░░░ 6/10  60%

Bar width: fixed 10 cells. Characters: █ (done) ░ (todo). ASCII fallback: # and -.

Only shown for type=epic; other types don't get a bar.

Do not double-count: a closed child is either in closed_children (archived) OR still a live task with status=closed. Union them.

--json: add 'progress': { closed: 6, total: 10 } on epics.
title: Epic progress bars (beyond beads)
